name: image_gen_phase0
methodology: Build-or-no-build memory GATE. With Qwen3-14B INT4 resident + a ~3000-token KV-cache populated, the AO eviction path (unload_vlm + substrate unload_embed_cache) was exercised, then the SDXL Text2ImagePipeline was loaded on-demand on the GPU and a single 1024x1024 image generated at 6 few-step (Lightning) inference steps; log_memory deltas were taken across load -> generate -> unload. One generate, one config -- a feasibility spike, NOT a throughput sweep. Uncensored = the checkpoint (the diffusers safety_checker is not emitted into the OpenVINO pipeline); no classifier.

models_co_resident: RealVisXL_V5.0 SDXL INT8 (nncf weight-only, diffusers-OpenVINO layout)
not_measured: GPU driver version (read from dxdiag / Device Manager; not introspectable here)
VLM + voice co-residency DURING a generate (the eviction sequence removes them first -- the intended-absent cost, not an unmeasured peak)
throughput across a prompt set / multiple resolutions (single feasibility generate)

measurements.gate_verdict: PASS -- budget closes with the 14B held resident; 14B-never-evicted invariant holds; build A-H proceeded

notes: Phase-0 build-or-no-build gate for UC-010 (ADR-033). Capability ships DORMANT ([image_generation].enabled=false + model gitignored). Community-grade LIVE numbers (per-resolution latency, fidelity, full eviction trace) land at the LA-present go-live ceremony.
